event: River barges along the Loing at Saint-Mammès
description: A riverscape showing a wide calm canal or river stretching to the right with houses along the far bank. On the near side, a sandy towpath runs alongside moored barges with dark hulls and red accents. Two horses and small figures work along the path. Bare trees dot the middle distance. The village houses have red and gray roofs. The sky is vast and pale blue with wispy clouds, occupying the upper two-thirds of the composition.

_meta.title: Barges on the Loing, Saint Mammes
